title: Post-implementation review — institutional-memory role modules (PR #126)
note: ADVISORY evaluation anchored to commit-verified facts. Optimizations feed forward: each names where it lands so the next run's pre-review reads it.
what_was_built: role modules daedalus/telos/argo + capability modules loadout/iliad; verifier growth 29 -> 175+ checks; env-surface closure; seat/prompt data separation; step ledger; CI institutional-memory job
verification_outcome: all green at every push head (17/17, 17/17, 18/18, 18/18 CI checks); 3/3 + 2/2 verifier mutations caught; full evidence: docs/runs/institutional-memory-role-modules/STEP-LEDGER.json
what_worked: behavioral PROBING over paraphrase — driving the real state machine / registry / gate and comparing terminals beats describing them (caught nothing drifting because nothing could)
disk ENUMERATION over hand-lists (readdirSync sweeps) — new modules/contracts joined verification with zero wiring
MUTATION-TESTING the verifier — proved the checks discriminate before trusting their green
writing the direct negative test FIRST surfaced unpinned behavior (the 'No Grok advisory packet present.' warning)
one module per commit with its own oracles in the same commit — claims could never outrun their checks
defects_found_during: dangling authority evidence on main: CURRENT-AUTHORITY cited docs/runs/clotho-authorization-8/ which did not exist (restored from origin branches; chain contract now fails closed on the class)
the unmerged clotho-task4b branch's hand-listed CONTRACT_FILES silently skips its own ledger-adapter-integrity.json (reconciliation flagged in TASK-LOADOUTS/task-4b)
advisory-absence gate behavior was unpinned until the negative test forced the question
process_mistakes_preserved: git add -A staged a session-worktree gitlink (caught, amended pre-push; .claude/ now git-ignored) -> rule: stage explicit paths
inline backticked text through bash mangled a PR body via command substitution (rebuilt via file) -> rule: file-based bodies for gh edits
a sed range mutation silently no-opped on JSON (redone via node) -> rule: mutate JSON with node/Edit, never sed
read tail's exit status as the test's ($? after a pipe) -> rule: PIPESTATUS[0], and re-run before reporting

optimizations_for_future_runs.optimization: run the PRE-REVIEW phase (models via env over seats.json; capabilities via TASK-LOADOUTS + prior retrospectives) before any implementation
HARVEST-FIRST for existing branches: reconcile origin/clotho-task4b instead of reimplementing 4b
add a warning line for malformed TELOS_LOADOUT files (currently silent programmatic-only fallback)
optimizations_for_future_runs.lands_in: candidate data/mechanism change; recorded in loadout NON-CLAIMS; adopt via a reviewed edit when touched next

optimizations_for_future_runs.optimization: when a new model generation ships, review build-gate/seats.json role bindings (constraints/implementation/adversary/verifier) against its strengths — a seat change is a data edit + this lifecycle's pre-review
process rules from mistakes (explicit staging, file-based gh bodies, node-not-sed for JSON, PIPESTATUS) apply to every future run
optimizations_for_future_runs.lands_in: this retrospective; candidate for a harness-level CLAUDE.md note if repeated
